name: Best Rain Team Regulation M-B: Builds and How to Play Guide
strategy: This is a complete guide on how to build the Best Rain Team for Regulation M-B, Season M-3 in Pokemon Champions! Read on to learn what a Rain team is, how to make the Best Rain team in this Regulation, what strategies to use, and how to counter it, and view battle-ready Rain teams!

name: Regulation M-A: Complete Roster and Schedule
strategy: Regulation M-A in Pokemon Champions the current format for ranked battles and will run from April 9 until June 17, 2026. Regulation M-A is the first Regulation available in the game and features 186 Pokemon and 59 of which are capable of Mega Evolution! Read on to learn more about Regulation M-A, the complete roster, and rules.

name: All Replica Team Codes
strategy: This is a list of Replica Teams that have reached a Rating of at least 2000 in Master Ball Rank during Season M-1 for Regulation M-A in Pokemon Champions. Check out our list of replica teams and rental codes, as well as how to use replica teams.
